approval_statement: I, edithatogo, approve bounded pilot execution-input readiness v0.2 candidate SHA-256 e91548e8814aba1659c0b1927fde70cad3a8809bb4c974d43d50606c500c016f as committed in 0e6e080bc63c0998a7ca46bc708734ae500f1302. I approve the exact requests 11872 and 35076 execution-input components, including the metadata-pinned three-file MuPDF derivation result, as ready for bounded local context-and-execution authorization preparation under the approved v0.2 analyst protocol. This approval does not authorize reading derived text, context materialization or presentation, analyst execution, reconciliation, empirical-result approval, population inference, archive-wide claims, human-reviewed claims, gold promotion, legal certification, redistribution, publication, training, fine-tuning, release, dataset publication, or paper updates. Derived-text access, context presentation, and analyst execution require a separately committed exact authorization and successful clean-HEAD pre-execution verification.
